channel.title: GeoPulse — Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefs on geopolitics, geography, and world history.

item.title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
item.description: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks. The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks. Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have' The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks. Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'

item.title: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges hearing for survivors
item.description: She called rumours that Epstein introduced her to Donald Trump "mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation". She called rumours that Epstein introduced her to Donald Trump "mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation". item.title: Taiwan opposition leader meets Xi Jinping in Beijing
item.description: Cheng Li-wun is the Kuomintang's first sitting leader to visit China in a decade. Cheng Li-wun is the Kuomintang's first sitting leader to visit China in a decade. Taiwan opposition leader meets Xi Jinping in Beijing Cheng Li-wun is the Kuomintang's first sitting leader to visit China in a decade. item.title: German transgender far-right extremist arrested in Czech Republic
item.description: German media reports say Marla-Svenja Liebich used to be a member of a neo-Nazi group called Blood and Honour. German media reports say Marla-Svenja Liebich used to be a member of a neo-Nazi group called Blood and Honour. item.title: Man accused of coercing wife into sex with 120 men goes on trial in Sweden
item.description: The 61-year-old denies threatening physical violence and plying his wife with drugs to force her into having sex with strangers. The 61-year-old denies threatening physical violence and plying his wife with drugs to force her into having sex with strangers. Man accused of coercing wife into sex with 120 men goes on trial in Sweden The 61-year-old denies threatening physical violence and plying his wife with drugs to force her into having sex with strangers. item.title: Russia and Ukraine agree to Orthodox Easter truce
item.description: Vladimir Putin announced the truce, which will last from Saturday afternoon through Easter Sunday. Vladimir Putin announced the truce, which will last from Saturday afternoon through Easter Sunday. item.title: Popular Tanzanian musician Matonya charged with rape in Kenya
item.description: The 43-year-old denies the charge and has been released on bail and had to surrender his passport. item.description: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts. item.title: Dutch police urge victims of 'international sextortion campaign' to come forward
item.description: Dutch police have warned that dozens of women and girls were coerced into degrading sexual acts on camera in several countries. Dutch police have warned that dozens of women and girls were coerced into degrading sexual acts on camera in several countries. Dutch police urge victims of 'international sextortion campaign' to come forward Dutch police have warned that dozens of women and girls were coerced into degrading sexual acts on camera in several countries. item.title: US has let in 4,499 refugees since October - all but three were South African
item.description: Trump has given priority to Afrikaners, a white minority group he says is being persecuted. South Africa has objected to his characterisation. item.title: Netanyahu removes Spain from Gaza coordination centre over ‘hostility’
item.description: Israel's Netanyahu accused Spain of waging a 'diplomatic war' against Israel. Israel's Netanyahu accused Spain of waging a 'diplomatic war' against Israel. item.title: JD Vance expects ‘positive’ US-Iran war talks as he departs for Pakistan
item.description: Vice president says Trump gave 'pretty clear guidelines' on talks, which will be productive if Iran does not 'play' US. item.title: Inflation rises in US amid Iran war, Hormuz blockade
item.description: Government report shows gasoline going up by 21.2 percent in March as petrol remains above $4 per gallon despite truce. item.title: Pakistan sets modest goal for US-Iran summit: A deal to keep talks going

item.title: Artemis II splashdown: When it lands, risks and how to watch live
item.description: The Orion spacecraft will make its return to Earth at 00:07 GMT, splashing down off the San Diego coast.
